title: Dirt Tools
description: This Mod Adds The Functionality To Use Dirt To Create Tools With It Just For Starting Out.
body:
**DISCORD LINK > https://discord.gg/rZe43Pc7
FOR ISSUES AND STUFF**

This mod adds some functionality to otherwise useless Dirt in Minecraft. You can create tools with Dirt. This mod also adds a Dirt Stick to the game that you can create Dirt Tools with. This mod requires no libraries to install and it is a standalone mod for **Forge 1.16**.

Tools that this mod adds:
+ Sword
+ Pickaxe
+ Axe
+ Hoe

Items that this mod adds:
+ Dirt Stick

All of the crafting recipes are in the "Gallery" tab.
